benefits.description: Long-term positive experience with CJC/IPA stack prior to this incident

side_effects.description: Whole body turned very red, especially arms, neck, and face; warmth rushed over body
Throat swelled slightly, breathing became labored/forced, felt like breathing on manual

protocol_notes: Injection performed with 30G 1/2" needle subcutaneously in belly, few inches off navel. Accidentally hit a blood vessel causing accidental IV administration of part of dose. Reaction occurred within 5-7 seconds. Treated with cold wet towel on neck, cold water, and 24hr antihistamine. Recovered within 15-20 minutes partially, fully within 1-2 hours. Normally injects TRT in love handle area for site rotation. Incident occurred in week 3 of cycle.
